name: Contract & Claims Management
student_summary: Manage the legal-commercial spine of big projects.
overview: Manage the legal-commercial spine of big projects. Contract & Claims Management sits in the Property & Assets family of Construction, Architecture & Urban Development. It is a broad career direction — you can enter it through several routes and specialize later without restarting.
who_is_this_for: You enjoy breaking problems into parts and reasoning them through
You notice the small things others miss
who_should_avoid: You strongly prefer solitary desk work over this field's day-to-day reality
daily_responsibilities: Apply fidic contracts to real problems
Collaborate with your team using claims preparation
Keep improving at arbitration support — the field keeps moving
Communicate progress, results and decisions to the people who depend on them

challenges: Early years demand patience before the rewards compound

faqs: What does Contract & Claims Management pay in India?
Entry roles typically start around ₹6 LPA and senior professionals reach ₹15 LPA or more. Live, region-specific salary data is retrieved by the platform when you ask.
What should I study after Class 12?
Focus on English, Mathematics. Typical degrees: B.Tech Civil + contract management, LLB helps. Alternatives exist: diploma + site experience ladder.
Will AI take over this career?
AI impact is low — AI assists rather than replaces. Broad paths like Contract & Claims Management evolve rather than disappear — the students who pair domain skill with AI tools benefit most.
Is this a broad path or a specific job?
Contract & Claims Management is a career direction. Once inside it you can specialize further — the platform will map specializations in future versions.
